ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, admin, counselor) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the goal */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the goal */,
  "x_pos" INTEGER /* X-coordinate of the goal on the canvas */,
  "y_pos" INTEGER /* Y-coordinate of the goal on the canvas */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Width of the goal's visual representation */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the goal's visual representation */,
  "shape" TEXT /* Shape of the goal's visual representation */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the goal */,
  "num" INTEGER /* Numerical identifier for the goal within the user's goal list */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment or note associated with the goal */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the goal was created or last updated */,
  "modifiable" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the goal is modifiable */,
  "canvas_id" INTEGER /* ID of the canvas where the goal is visualized */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the goal belongs to */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the goal */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the goal was started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Expected completion date of the goal */,
  "actual_end_date" TEXT /* Actual completion date of the goal */,
  "goal_status" TEXT /* Current status of the goal (e.g., in progress, completed, pending) */,
  "privacy_setting" TEXT /* Privacy setting of the goal (e.g., private, public) */,
  "reminder_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of reminders for the goal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goals_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goals_canvas_id FOREIGN KEY ("canvas_id") REFERENCES canvases ("canvas_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goals_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES goal_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goals_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goal_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Mental Health, Physical Health, Skill Development) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goal_shapes" (
  "shape_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shape */,
  "shape_name" TEXT /* Name of the shape (e.g., positive strong, negative weak) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shape */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the shape */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shape_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goal_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the goal the comment is associated with */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "edited_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was last edited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goal_comments_goal_id FOREIGN KEY ("goal_id") REFERENCES goals ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goal_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goal_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES goal_comments ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goal_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the goal that was changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., created, updated, deleted) */,
  "change_details" TEXT /* Details of the change */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time of the change */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value after the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goal_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goal_history_goal_id FOREIGN KEY ("goal_id") REFERENCES goals ("goal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "canvases" (
  "canvas_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each canvas */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the canvas */,
  "canvas_name" TEXT /* Name of the canvas */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the canvas was created */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time the canvas was last modified */,
  "privacy_setting" TEXT /* Privacy setting of the canvas (e.g., private, public) */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of user IDs the canvas is shared with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("canvas_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_canvases_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goal_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress entry */,
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the goal being tracked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user tracking the progress */,
  "progress_status" TEXT /* Status of the goal (e.g., in progress, completed, pending) */,
  "progress_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the progress */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time the progress was recorded */,
  "progress_percentage" INTEGER /* Percentage of completion */,
  "next_steps" TEXT /* Next steps or actions required to achieve the goal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goal_progress_goal_id FOREIGN KEY ("goal_id") REFERENCES goals ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goal_progress_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goal_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the goal the tag is associated with */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag (e.g., mental health, skill development) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goal_tags_goal_id FOREIGN KEY ("goal_id") REFERENCES goals ("goal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., user, admin, counselor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view goal) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "session_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the user's session */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
